content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.63%, Bank Nifty -0.79%, VIX +3.3% to 17.17 — risk-off tone with IT bucking via Coforge-led move. Most holdings in green from yesterday's broad rally; today's tape is consolidation/pullback. Focus is position management — trail SLs on winners that have moved >2-4% in our favor, then assess whether the strong volume-led names (CAMS, GRSE, COFORGE) deserve trailing tightening given they've already hit/exceeded targets.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.6% unrealized, well above breakeven. Current SL 1051.64 is already above entry 984 — locking gain. Trail to 1045 (~2.6% below CMP 1072.80, above pivot 1045.93 / R1 1053). Maintains >1% trail-gap discipline (2.6%). Target 1110 intact — near 52w high 1141.90. HFC sector relief from RBI threshold + best-in-class GNPA/disbursement growth."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES recovering +1.87% today on geopolitical bid. -0.5% unrealized, SL 121 (~2.8% below CMP) intact. Macro hedge thesis valid as VIX rises. Hold, no trail needed yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 4950.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.1% unrealized, +4.37% today on heavy volume. SL 4725.56 already above entry 4575 — gain locked. Keeping SL (1.7% below CMP 4812 — note: this is below the 1% floor concern but stored SL is unchanged from prior tick; actually trailing to 4725 keeps it). Raising target to 4950 from 4900 — closer to 52w high 5165, and Q4 board meeting May 14 IS a binary catalyst within 4 sessions. Per Rule 11: position is currently 5% of capital (₹50K), within event-trade size. SL at 4725.56 caps downside to ~1.7% from CMP. Acceptable event-trade disposition (b) — tight-ish SL with target room. Note: this MODIFY only raises target; SL unchanged from stored. [Correcting: emitting only target change]"
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.0% unrealized. SL 6960 already above entry 6900. CMP 7014.50 — SL 6960 is only 0.78% below CMP, BELOW the 1% trail-gap floor. Per Rule 14(c), should not trail tighter; instead leaving SL at 6960 (no change — this is a no-op MODIFY, switching to HOLD). [Correcting to HOLD]"
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at +0.1%. SL 836 sits 0.7% below CMP 842 — already very tight. No change warranted; let SL fire if it does or wait for Q4 board meeting catalyst. Promoter warrant at 945-947 supports thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1% unrealized, SL 365 just below CMP 365.85 (0.2% gap, very tight). Per Rule 17, do not front-run own SL. Q4 results were strong (+30% PAT). Either SL fires or recovers — let it play. NOT exiting on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.2% unrealized. SL 815 (0.5% above entry) — already locked breakeven+. CMP 830.85, SL 1.9% below CMP — within 1% floor compliant. Q4 +22% revenue strong. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1303.30,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.7% — best winner. CMP 1330.10 has hit original target 1330. Strong Q4 (+29% rev, FY26 PAT +91%). SL 1303.30 is 2.0% below CMP — compliant with 1% floor. Raising target to 1395 (next resistance zone, ~5% upside) given Encora + Cigniti synergies and PL Capital target Rs 2,020 implies long runway. SL unchanged (already locked +3.5% from entry)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3025.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7% unrealized, SL at entry 3025 (breakeven). CMP 3060.10 — SL 1.1% below, just above 1% floor. No change needed; this is effectively a HOLD. [Switching to HOLD]"
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.8% unrealized. SL at entry 806 (breakeven). CMP 835.75. Trailing SL up to 815 (1.1% above entry) — locks +1.1%, sits 2.5% below CMP (well above 1% floor). Per Rule 14(b), at +3.8% gain SHOULD raise SL to a trail level. 815 is the calibrated breakeven+ trail. Raising target to 870 (closer to 52w high 875)."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock more of the +8.6% gain; SL 1045 sits 2.6% below CMP, above pivot."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge intact, no trail needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 4725 already locks +3.3% gain. Q4 board May 14 — event-trade size acceptable, target raised to 4950."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 only 0.78% below CMP — below 1% floor; do not tighten further. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already very tight at 836; respect it."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Don't front-run SL; thesis intact post Q4 +30% PAT."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry, breakeven locked."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1303.30 locks +3.5%; target raised to 1395 to give room post-Q4 momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry, breakeven protection in place."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock +1.1% gain on +3.8% winner; SL 2.5% below CMP."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Several BULLISH watchlist names rejected today with explicit reasons: (1) SRF — would stack into NAVINFLUOR specialty-chem cluster, redundant exposure, decline. (2) POLYCAB / FINCABLES — extended +9% gap-up moves, chasing ATH gaps without confirmation; pass at these levels. (3) PIDILITIND — +9.68% gap on Q4, classic sell-the-news risk; wait for retracement. (4) WOCKPHARMA / LAURUSLABS — pharma volume spikes on a soft pharma index day, mixed signal; pass. (5) NUVAMA — +18% on earnings gap, overextended; never chase Day-1 of an earnings gap. (6) SBIN — Q4 results TODAY, binary event, NO_ACTION on event day. (7) TATATECH — volume divergence interesting but no clear trigger price. (8) RAMCOCEM — research flagged BEARISH (-0.10), CLSA Underperform Rs 890 below CMP. Reject. (9) GABRIEL — auto ancillary on weak auto day, pass. (10) KPIL / LUPIN — no fresh catalyst, hold for cleaner setup. Existing book at 49% deployed with 10 positions across BFSI/Defense/Specialty Chem/IT/FMCG/Cement-Gold — adequately diversified; no admit forced today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "10 holdings, 49% deployed, ₹515K cash. Today's tape (Nifty -0.63%, VIX +3.3%) is consolidation, not panic — let yesterday's gains breathe. Five SLs already at or above entry (HAL, MARICO, GRSE, CAMS post-trail, PNBHOUSING) — book is structurally protected. Per Rule 18, watchlist candidates were walked through with explicit per-name rejects above; the conservatism today is earned (binary event days, gap-chases, cluster overlap). HAL Q4 May 14 is the next binary to manage — currently sized at ₹50K (~5% of capital), within event-trade rule. Will assess size reduction approaching May 13."
}
